creator: toghrulgasimov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #2)
if I install pkg install libreoffice de-libreoffice
If I change my local language to de (german) and open libreoffice.
It open libreoffice with german language. But If I libreoffice-help from menu.
It open non existing URL. In old versions there are no problem.
It opens with browser file:///usr/local/lib/libreoffice/help/index.html?Target=swriter/.uno%3AHelpIndex&Language=de&System=UNIX&Version=7.2 link.
which does not exist. It should open libreoffice's custom help window.
In English language it works. The problem is not just with german language but with all language except English
